title: Integrating Bulk and Single-Cell RNA Sequencing to Identify Prognostic Genes Associated with Adaptive Immunity and the Tumor Microenvironment in Cholangiocarcinoma for Risk Model Construction.
snippet: Cholangiocarcinoma (CCA) has a complex tumor microenvironment (TME) and poor immunotherapy response. Understanding how the adaptive immune response (AIR) affects the TME and prognosis is critical. All data were obtained from publicly available resources. Differentially expressed genes (DEGs) were identified by comparing tumor vs. normal and stromal/immune s...
